MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff'S Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to prepare a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling.
